candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue; clearly labeled and matches REVT definition.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Interest component of financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Part of comprehensive income distribution, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive result, not revenue.
Non-recurring non-business items, not core revenue.

variables.notes: Using the clearly labeled top-line revenue figure 'Total Revenue'.

candidates.why: Standard label for cost of sales / COGS; directly matches definition.
May include both production and overhead labor; less precise than explicit COGS label.
Overhead-type operating expenses; more appropriate for SG&A than COGS.
Selling/marketing overhead, not direct COGS.
Financing result, not cost of sales.
Financial expenses, not COGS.

variables.notes: COGS mapped to the explicit 'Cost of goods sold' line.

candidates.why: Clearly an operating overhead bucket; fits SG&A definition.
Explicit SG&A label; even if values appear missing in preview, it is semantically correct to include.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of marketing-related intangibles; often included within SG&A. Allowed as an SG&A component though D&A are generally separated, but here it is specifically marketing-related overhead.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental

variables.notes: Selected SG&A component rows only, avoiding totals/subtotals. Included explicit SG&A line plus major overhead bucket and marketing-related intangible amortization as components.
No research & development expense line is present in the provided Income Statement preview; treating XRD as zero.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; relevant if main interest expense is missing, so used as secondary fallback.
Earnings allocation, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Part of comprehensive income, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; usable as tertiary fallback.
Fair value adjustments on swaps, not pure interest expense.
Equity of minority shareholders, not interest.
Equity of minority shareholders, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense labels, starting with the generic 'Interest expense' then lease-specific interest lines as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Component of equity (retained earnings) but not total equity attributable to owners; less suitable than total shareholders equity for BE.
Equity attributable to shareholders (owners) excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Includes non-controlling interests, which would lead to double-counting with MIB.
Balancing construct, not a substantive equity figure to prefer over explicit totals.
Balancing construct, not primary equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not appropriate for BE.
Total of both sides of balance sheet, not equity alone.

variables.notes: BE mapped to 'Total shareholders equity', which represents equity attributable to owners and excludes non-controlling interests (reported separately).

candidates.why: Income statement allocation, not the balance sheet minority equity, but confirms presence of NCI.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not the stock of minority interest.
Primary balance sheet line for minority equity; best match for MIB.
Alternative label for same concept; good secondary fallback.
Income statement item related to minority interest, not the stock on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet lines representing minority equity, providing both primary and alternative labels as a priority list.
